changes.before: Supplier marked with a symbol she did not know: a wheel inside a wheel.
changes.after: Supplier marked with a symbol she did not know—a wheel inside a wheel.

changes.before: Fenwick Crossing was bigger: four clerks, deeper shelves, a yard master who wore his authority like a coat borrowed for the day.
changes.after: Fenwick Crossing was bigger—four clerks, deeper shelves, a yard master who wore his authority like a coat borrowed for the day.

changes.before: The road was doing what a road did: carrying the same trouble farther than any one village could see.
changes.after: The numbers showed the same mark feeding the sickest towns, and the same trouble kept moving south on wagon routes, farther than any one village could see.

changes.before: The road was doing what a road did: carrying the same trouble farther than any one village could see.
changes.after: The numbers showed the same mark feeding the sickest towns, and the same trouble kept moving south on wagon routes, farther than any one village could see.

changes.before: Not north. Not toward the border farms Sylvanas had been measuring in her head. South and west instead, into the heavy grain roads that fed the kingdom's interior, the ones laid in her grandmother's day to drag harvest out of the Andorhal basin.
changes.after: South and west instead, into the heavy grain roads that fed the kingdom's interior, the ones laid in her grandmother's day to drag harvest out of the Andorhal basin.

changes.before: The shape of the march had settled without anyone naming it.
changes.after: Without naming it, they had settled into marching order.

changes.before: "Not one accident. Many placements."
changes.after: "Many placements."

changes.before: They were hunting a thread woven through the routes that already existed, hidden as long as it kept the right pace on the right roads.
changes.after: They were no longer chasing one crooked route; they were hunting shipments slipped into routes that already existed, hidden as long as they moved at the right pace on the right roads.

changes.before: Not missing. Not mangled. Clean.
changes.after: Clean.

changes.before: It was the look of a room that had been given an hour's warning and used it well.
changes.after: It was the look of a room whose cleaners had been given an hour's warning and used it well.

changes.before: She did not stop because she thought the trail dead. She stopped because there was nothing else in this room worth the next hour.
changes.after: She stopped because there was nothing else in this room worth the next hour.

changes.before: Not abandoned. Interrupted.
changes.after: Interrupted.

changes.before: The invoices in the window were blank as well: fresh paper stacked where it would be seen from outside.
changes.after: The invoices in the window were blank as well—fresh paper stacked where it would be seen from outside.

changes.before: If the road expected inspection, the true record would travel with the people who mattered.
changes.after: If the people running this stop expected inspection, the true record would travel with the people who mattered.

changes.before: Most of it was nothing: wagon loads, dates, shorthand.
changes.after: Most of it was nothing—wagon loads, dates, shorthand.

changes.before: Not a factor. A property.
changes.after: A property.

changes.before: "To cover themselves. The man at Millbrook Spur, the blank books, the missing shipment—that feels like a road being scrubbed, not a road still taking fresh loads."
changes.after: "To cover themselves. The man at Millbrook Spur, the blank books, the missing shipment—that feels like people scrubbing the route behind themselves, not moving fresh loads through it."

changes.before: That had not been carelessness. It had been the best read available.
changes.after: It had been the best read available.

changes.before: The miss sat badly because of its size, not because she should have known better.
changes.after: The miss sat badly because of its size.

changes.before: The map was only catching up to it.
changes.after: She had only marked the road they were already riding toward.

changes.before: South waited.
changes.after: [deleted]

changes.before: At the far window the mage made a small noise that could have meant agreement.
changes.after: At the far window the mage made a small noise.

changes.before: Jaina went still for a beat, then nodded once.
changes.after: Jaina paused, then nodded once.

changes.before: That changed the hunt.
changes.after: They were no longer chasing one crooked route; they were hunting shipments slipped into routes that already existed, hidden as long as they moved at the right pace on the right roads.

changes.before: South waited.
changes.after: [deleted]

changes.before: Big enough for its own factor's office. Big enough for merchant bunks. Big enough to matter.
changes.after: It had its own factor's office and merchant bunks.

changes.before: The map was only catching up to it.
changes.after: She had only marked the road they were already riding toward.

changes.before: The numbers made the shape plain.
changes.after: The numbers showed the same mark feeding the sickest towns, and the same trouble kept moving south on wagon routes, farther than any one village could see.

changes.before: Big enough to matter.
changes.after: It had its own factor's office and merchant bunks.

changes.before: "It's direction."
changes.after: "It's a road to follow."
